career_angle: LLM developments affect every developer. Understand the capabilities and limitations - knowing what AI can't do is as valuable as knowing what it can.

dimensions.name: Source Authority
dimensions.rationale: 'Claude Code Anniversary + Launches from: Qwen 3.5, Cursor...' -- AI News (smol.ai) is unclassified or low-reliability source (tier_5, reliability: 20%) reporting on OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta. Cites: according to a tweet from Alibaba

dimensions.name: Evidence Quality
dimensions.rationale: references specific benchmarks: HuggingFace model/dataset, SWE-bench benchmark; references academic work; specific figures cited: 't throughput—“30%', 'reported SOTA at 72%', 'a ceiling (e.g., ~95%'

dimensions.name: Specificity
